attempt_summary: {'recommended_plan': 'Qualify ALT-B immediately, recover all missing-chart units by coupon test, submit MRB in parallel, and use expedited NDT in week 4 only.', 'conservative_total_cost': 5717400, 'approved_total_cost': 4477400, 'expected_value_cost': 5035400}

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Surface a per-week mass-balance check (Beg Inv + Releases - Shipments = End Inv) and a visible lead-time tracker to definitively evidence no negative inventories and correct timing.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Memo explicitly enforces no AOG from missing-chart units, SD-44 confined to Cert until MRB effective in week 3, ALT-B output no earlier than week 3 with 4 destructive units consumed, and uses expedite only in a single chosen week. Weekly allocation narrative maintains priority and shows backlogs clearing by week 4. Mass-balance appears plausible from described flows, though full verification depends on workbook formulas.

Decisions (qualify ALT-B, limited expedite) are tied to clearing OEM line-stop risk with timing consistent with constraints.
